channel.title: [Blog Post] Frontity 2020: A Year in Review
channel.description:
Before the New Year, we wanted to take a look back over some of our biggest updates and the milestones that shaped this year for us.
We couldn’t have done all this without you helping us out in such a multitude of ways. Thanks for being part of this community — we can't wait to show you what's in store for 2021! 🙌
Happy New Year from all of us at Frontity! 🎉
https://frontity.org/blog/frontity-2020-a-year-in-review/

item.title: [Blog Post] Frontity 2020: A Year in Review
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Before the New Year, we wanted to take a look back over some of our biggest updates and the milestones that shaped this year for us.

We couldn’t have done all this without you helping us out in such a multitude of ways. Thanks for being part of this community — we can’t wait to show you what’s in store for 2021!

Happy New Year from all of us at Frontity!

Frontity – 28 Dec 20

Frontity 2020: A Year in Review

2020 has been an exciting year for Frontity! Here are our highlights from the last 12 months and what we have accomplished together.

Read full topic
item.source: [Blog Post] Frontity 2020: A Year in Review
